economic_mechanism: Scheduled FOMC decisions resolve a large prior-known macro information set; in an already non-bearish SPY regime, gradual interpretation and institutional repositioning may create positive five-session drift beyond ordinary same-regime drift.
forecast_type: conditional direction up after scheduled policy-information resolution
candidate_or_family_scope: FOMC_INFORMATION_RESOLUTION_SPY_BULL_CALL_21D_V1 / FOMC_POLICY_INFORMATION_RESOLUTION_DRIFT on SPY; official exact-title 14:00 ET FOMC statements from 2013-01-01 through 2025-12-31; non-bearish prior regime; next-session-open through fifth-session-close underlying outcome; prior-only same-regime controls; future conditional 18-24 DTE $2 bull-call only.
falsifier: Close the exact family if the chronological first 60% has fewer than 36 one-to-one matched pairs, fewer than 6 event years, control support below 80%, non-positive event mean after 10 bps, non-positive paired mean or one-sided 90% year-block-bootstrap lower bound, paired positive frequency below 55%, worst-decile event return below -5%, or any source/chronology/lag/overlap/reuse/population/strict-JSON violation.

candidate_geometry.regime: prior completed close > fully warmed SMA100 and trailing 60-session return > 0
candidate_geometry.entry: next completed regular session open after the 14:00 ET statement
candidate_geometry.exit: close of the fifth session including entry

control_geometry.event_exclusion_source: Federal Reserve exact-title 14:00 ET statement rows
tie_breaks: lowest normalized hv20 plus ret60 feature distance

capital_rules.max_loss_semantics: future frictionless $2 width bound before closing friction; no option pricing in F0
capital_rules.portfolio_overlap_rule: one global policy-event risk unit; no overlapping candidate exposure

evidence_rules.authority: F0/F1 L0 research only; no L1, capital seat, registry, paper, shadow, arm, broker, funding, or live authority

epoch_success_definition: Advance the exact candidate from F0 to F1 only if every frozen train discovery gate passes with the sealed 40% holdout unread and zero option pricing; otherwise close the exact policy-information-resolution family without threshold, sign, regime, control, horizon, or option-structure retuning.
dominant_failure_mechanism: After fail-closing controls to the Federal Reserve press-index source-coverage boundary, 46 train pairs across 8 event years remained. Five-session SPY event return after 10 bps was -0.275586%, paired excess versus prior-only same-regime controls was -0.453418%, positive frequency was 39.1304%, and the one-sided 90% year-block lower bound was -0.781803%; the stated bullish drift was absent and directionally adverse.
closed_family_quarantine: Do not rerun the same SPY non-bearish exact-14:00 FOMC next-open/five-session bullish-drift geometry by changing thresholds, horizon, control match, DTE, or option wrapper. Reopening requires a genuinely new forecast/evidence mechanism, not retuning.
next_seed: CPI_RELEASE_INFORMATION_RESOLUTION_SPY_F0: context-only proposal for a materially distinct official 08:30 ET inflation-surprise/policy-repricing mechanism; do not open the FOMC holdout or retune the closed FOMC family, and supersede if next orientation finds a higher-information route.
